user.title: Set up Planika Fireplace
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Planika fireplace on the local network.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Planika fireplace. Check the IP address and ensure the device is reachable.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Planika fireplace is already configured.
